variants: Ayumi Noorani was born in Lakefire Settlement and later attended Greymoor College of Science, where she developed a keen interest in Italian phonetics. After completing her education, she joined Copper Skies Brewing, where she has made significant contributions to the beer-making process. Apart from her professional work, Ayumi serves as a Planner for Alderstone Festival Council, helping to organize community events that bring people together. Her passion for both her profession and her community exemplifies her commitment to cultural enrichment. Ayumi's ability to blend her language skills with her community service makes her a vibrant member of her town.
